prompt:
Subject:
Morning in the shadows of flowers

Main Subject:
A vertical realistic photographic work. Large placement of a young woman in her early 20s lying on white lace bedding, from the center of the screen downwards. The head is towards the upper left, the body flows diagonally to the lower right, with the figure occupying about 75% of the screen. A scene of quietly waking up while basking in the morning light on a white bed placed in a spring garden.

Person & Expression:
A woman with natural and elegant Japanese-style makeup. Light ivory skin with soft morning highlights on cheeks, nose, and collarbones. Long dark brown hair, nearly black, spread loosely over a white pillow. Eyes gazing slightly sleepily at the camera, mouth naturally half-open. An expression that captures the stillness of waking up and the brightness of the morning.

Clothing & Pose:
An elegant white full-lace summer dress. Fabric layers naturally cover the chest, waist, and thighs, ensuring a clean impression without excessive transparency. The right arm is lightly held over the forehead, catching the morning sun at the wrist. The left arm is loosely bent near the hair, fingertips slightly touching it. The body is in a diagonal posture close to supine, with the front leg heavily foregrounded toward the lower right, and lace fabric overlapping softly along the body's lines.

Background & Light:
An outdoor flowering garden. White lace sheets in the foreground, white pillows and the person in the middle ground, and a background of pale pink, white, and purple small flowers and fresh green leaves. Low morning light streams from the upper right, casting detailed leaf shadows on the face, arms, dress, and legs. Reflected light from the white fabric wraps the skin in brightness, while shadows remain soft in light gray and pale beige. Background flowers are heavily blurred to create a transparency as if containing morning dew.

Composition & Camera:
Vertical composition, 3:4 ratio. Camera is a close portrait positioned slightly high from the feet side. The face is near the upper-left rule of thirds, with a large foreground of lace and legs in the lower right. Focus is on the face and upper body, while the foreground legs and background flowers are naturally blurred with shallow depth of field. The diagonal flow of the body, curves of the arms, and overlapping white fabric create a quiet morning rhythm.

Texture & Style:
Realistic photographic expression as if taken with a professional camera. Bright exposure, natural skin texture, fine weave of white lace, and soft highlights from the morning sun are carefully depicted. The color palette centers on ivory white, fresh green, and pale pink, creating a clean spring morning atmosphere. Avoid excessive skin smoothing, naturally retaining the textures of fabric, skin, hair, and flowers.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor clothing contact, floating fabric, unnatural gravity, overly transparent clothing, excessive exposure, lingerie-like expression, shadows inconsistent with light source, gibberish text, logos, watermarks, plastic-like skin.
